curation_notes: The patch commit b27de1c replaced Math.random() with crypto.randomInt() in index.js. The vulnerable rand() function was removed and its usage in generate() was updated to use crypto.randomInt() directly. Only 1 non-test source file (index.js) was changed; other changes were README.md, package.json, and package-lock.json. Location derived from the patch diff: the rand function in index.js used Math.random() for character selection. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness is correct (CWE-330: Use of Insufficiently Random Values). Re-curated with improved L1/L3 hints: L1 broadened to avoid hinting at character selection mechanism, L3 area and description made more specific than L1/L2 per updated guidelines.
